name: Wheated
teaser: Very tasty sourdough pizza coupled with the best whiskey list I've ever seen in a restaurant, let alone a pizzeria.
review: Very tasty sourdough pizza coupled with the best whiskey list I've ever seen in a restaurant, let alone a pizzeria.
headsUp: Flatbush is worth the trip if you love interesting dough.
update: Still one of the most interesting fermentation programs in Brooklyn.
